body_txt: Any character with more than two breasts has a case of multiboobage. The term originated (or at least, was popularised) by The Funday Pawpet Show 's Simba, whose character, Arthur Bronswager, sings the parody song "Total Recallin'", which contains the line, " The best part was the girl with three breasts ." This is fairly common in parts of the Furry Fandom , mainly due to this being Truth in Television for most mammals. A triple or more breast count is almost exclusively done with female breasts—you're unlikely to see a male furry with more than two nipples (unless this is a transgender or intersex person with breasts), even if he is in the same drawing as a female with more than two. Most male characters with extra chest accessories fall under the Sister Trope Triple Nipple .
